name: Foreign Earned Income Withholding Exclusion

eligibility.description: U.S. citizens working abroad who meet the physical presence or bona fide residence test for the Foreign Earned Income Exclusion.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Remuneration paid to U.S. citizens is excluded from 'wages' for withholding purposes if it is reasonable to believe the income will be excluded from gross income under Section 911.
